mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diary(user_id, title, content, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM diary WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM diary WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY create_time DESC
